Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Darryl Thomas. Attorney Monelle Palencia appearing for the Plaintiff.
Defendant Deshaune Lumpkin IS NOT present.

The settlement conference is taken off calendar because there was no appearance by defendant. The trial date of JAN-23-2012 remains on calendar.
